patterns_recognized: Negative-edge GOLD picks failed 0-for-2 on 05-09 (CHC@TEX -4.41pp lost 0-6; NYY@MIL -2.00pp lost 3-4); market holds SP-day information the model doesn't — downgrade any GOLD pick where edge_pp is negative or unverified.
PLATINUM tier historical hit rate ~43%; COL@PHI recurring on slate three consecutive days at PLATINUM with no fair_prob and p_model only 52% — same structural fragility each time.

Stage 1/2 gap >20pp without F2_xwoba >= 0.025 signals an unreliable bullpen-carry thesis; today CHC@TEX shows TEX winning F5 at 70% while CHC picks up full-game win at 53%, a 23pp gap with F2=0.023 just below the exception threshold.

Stacked pipeline flags (confidence_downgrade=True + bullpen_fatigue=True) on GOLD picks reliably signal DOWNGRADE; validated on 05-09 with DET@KC and COL@PHI both correct downgrades using stacked-flag protocol.

PIT@SF Stage 1/2 gap with F2_xwoba >= 0.025 must NOT be downgraded; 05-09 lesson confirmed blowout wins are possible when the lineup signal is independently strong enough to force an early lead and make the bullpen carry thesis moot.

WSH @ MIA.reasoning: SKIP tier; no fair_prob and odds_status=no_match mean edge is unverifiable. MIA f5_prob=0.577 and full_prob=0.512 show modest home advantage. Calibrated 51.18% sits in the 0.5-0.6 bin at 47.8% real win rate — below 50%. On 05-08 MIA lost a small-edge pick; on 05-09 won narrowly in a high-scoring game. No signals fire. No basis to escalate beyond SKIP.

OAK @ BAL.reasoning: SKIP tier; no fair_prob, odds_status=no_match. BAL (home) wins F5 at 48% and full at 44%, yet OAK is model pick at 56% — the model and stage outputs disagree with BAL winning either stage. On 05-09 OAK won 6-2 at SKIP; today's structure is similar with no escalating flags. Low conviction coin-flip SKIP.

TB @ BOS.reasoning: GOLD with no verified edge (odds_status=no_match). Per 05-09 validated pattern: negative-edge GOLD picks failed 0-for-2 — and without fair_prob we cannot confirm the edge is positive. Stage gap is minimal (TB wins F5 55%, full 54.3% — only 0.67pp). F3_swing_take_gap=910.5 is real but on 05-08 the same signal fired for TB and lost (BOS SP dominated). DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

COL @ PHI.reasoning: PLATINUM historically hits ~43% (heuristic 4). No fair_prob (odds_status=no_match) makes edge unverifiable. Base pick_prob=50.81% is barely above a coin flip despite PLATINUM classification. F1_xera_gap=3.99 and F3=772.9 fire, but without market anchor these signals cannot be trusted alone. Third consecutive slate appearance of COL@PHI at PLATINUM with no fair_prob. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

LAA @ TOR.reasoning: SKIP tier pre-assigned; edge outside [4,15] band. Calibrated 67.43% → ~57.97% (0.6-0.7 bin). On 05-09 TOR demolished LAA 14-1 at SKIP — direction has been correct two consecutive days. Edge band filter correctly prevents staking. No new information to escalate beyond SKIP.

HOU @ CIN.reasoning: SKIP with Stage 1/2 gap concern: CIN (home) wins F5 at only 35%, but HOU full pick_prob = 51.25% — requires HOU's bullpen to convert an early lead. On 05-09 this bullpen-carry thesis failed (CIN won 3-1). Calibrated to below 50%. No fair_prob. SKIP confirmed; very low conviction.

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: GOLD with four concurrent risk factors: (1) F3_swing_take_gap=16.1 is an extremely weak signal compared to this slate's 1774.2 and 910.5; (2) Stage 1/2 gap of 10.7pp (CLE wins F5 at 54.7% but full at 65.9%) with bullpen_fatigue=True; (3) confidence_downgrade=True pipeline flag; (4) home favorite at 65.9% exceeds heuristic-1 threshold. Stacked flags validate DOWNGRADE.

SEA @ CHW.reasoning: CHW at 68.03% triggers heuristic 1 (home favorite >65%) with no fair_prob to confirm the edge. May 8 disaster: CHW at 74% with large model-market gap — SEA won 12-8. Today's no_match odds_status means we cannot verify whether market supports CHW's 68% or is fading it. Without market confirmation, heuristic-1 DOWNGRADE stands. F3=239.7 is a moderate signal but not enough to override the unverifiable overconfidence concern.

NYY @ MIL.reasoning: Carlos Rodón has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP-edge score impossible. NYY has lost two consecutive games in this series (05-08: 0-6 to Misiorowski; 05-09: 3-4 in close game) while Vegas slightly favored MIL both days. Without Rodón's SP-quality score any NYY directional call is unanchored. PENDING is correct; no pick is the right call.

CHC @ TEX.reasoning: GOLD with 22.9pp Stage 1/2 gap: TEX (home) wins F5 at 70%, but CHC wins the full game at 53% — CHC's bullpen must overcome an early TEX advantage. F2_xwoba=0.023 misses the 0.025 exception threshold, so the 05-09 'no auto-downgrade' exception does NOT apply. p_model=53.13% calibrates to 47.8% (0.5-0.6 bin). On 05-09 CHC GOLD confirm with negative edge lost 0-6 — same structure. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

PIT @ SF.reasoning: Stage 1/2 gap is 26.9pp (SF wins F5 at 66.8%, PIT wins full at 60.1%), but F2_xwoba=0.032 exceeds the 0.025 threshold — exactly the 05-09 exception: 'lineup may dominate early and make the bullpen carry thesis moot.' edge=8.47pp (positive, within band), fair_prob=0.5163 (above 0.42 floor), no stacked flags. On 05-09 PIT dominated SF 13-3 with the same structure. Only verified-edge GOLD on the slate.

NYM @ ARI.reasoning: SKIP; edge barely in-band but capped (fetched_capped). Stage 1/2 gap: ARI wins F5 at 76% but full at only 54.7% — a 21.3pp gap suggesting bullpen-carry thesis. Calibrated 54.66% → 47.8% (0.5-0.6 bin). On 05-08 ARI lost at 68%; on 05-09 ARI won narrowly 2-1 with SKIP correctly applied both days. SKIP is appropriate.

STL @ SD.reasoning: Largest Stage 1/2 gap on the slate: SD (home) wins F5 at 77.6%, STL wins full at 55.8% — a 33.4pp gap requiring STL's bullpen to completely overcome SD's starter. fair_prob=0.8423 means Vegas prices SD at ~84% — model at 56% STL is a 28.4pp disagreement. No F-signals fire. On 05-09 STL lost 2-4. SKIP is correct; this matchup has no reliable directional signal.

ATL @ LAD.reasoning: F3_swing_take_gap=1774.2 is the strongest SP-independent lineup signal on the slate; Stage 1/2 gap minimal at 5.8pp (no bullpen-carry concern). edge=6.93pp within band (verified via fetched_capped). Calibrated 65.03% → ~57.97%. Heuristic-1 (home favorite >65%) triggered but the very strong F3 signal qualifies as the 'strong supporting signal' exception. On 05-08 LAD won 3-1 with the same structure.

DET @ KC.reasoning: Brenan Hanifee has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP-edge score impossible. With no SP quality differential, the model has insufficient information to generate a reliable directional pick. PENDING designation is correct; no pick warranted.
